construction.coordinate_model: standard icosahedron coordinates pulled back through the certified dual graph and truncated at one-third edge positions
construction.discriminant: union of support hyperplanes where any support slack equals zero
construction.support_matrix: one support inequality for each face/non-face vertex pair: b_f - <n_f, x_v> > 0

witness.coordinate_model: standard icosahedron coordinates pulled back through the certified dual graph and truncated at one-third edge positions
